video.title: Why Should Anyone Listen to Me?
video.description:
This is Part 4 from the full Speediance/Fitness Tech workout discussion. I respond to the idea of "who would ever want to listen to you?" by giving the background behind my software career, AI work, Project Aria, and why I am comfortable talking through smart-gym software and product decisions.

I also touch on investing, technology companies, risk, growing up without a big safety net, and why I wish I had learned more about investing earlier.

Full episode: https://youtu.be/GzqAzoSKBWQ

Not financial, career, training, or medical advice. This is personal experience and commentary.

Chapters

00:00 "Who would listen to you?"
01:30 From junior developer to software career
03:00 AI changing programming work
04:30 Why the channel kept going
06:00 Investing background and tech focus
07:30 Risk, borrowed money, and early lessons
09:00 No safety net and career pressure
10:30 Gratitude and transition to trackers

Hashtags

ProjectAria #AI #FitnessTech
